requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920, IEC 61727, and Harmonics Evidence for Kuwait PV Inverter Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——科威特光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920、IEC 61727及谐波证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——科威特光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920、IEC 61727及諧波證據

summary.en: For Kuwait PV inverter projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be built around IEC and GSO/GCC-recognised standards unless MEW or the project owner specifies a more detailed local requirement. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment; IEC 61727 addresses utility-interface characteristics for photovoltaic systems and may be requested with harmonic, flicker, DC injection, and power-quality evidence. No standalone Kuwait public EMC technical regulation specifically for PV inverters was confirmed in this draft review, so requirements should be checked through MEW, PAI/KUCAS, and the project specification.
summary.zh: 对于科威特光伏逆变器项目，除非MEW或项目业主规定更详细的本地要求，EMC和电能质量证据应围绕IEC及GSO/GCC认可标准建立。IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准；IEC 61727规定光伏系统公用电网接口特性，可能与谐波、闪变、直流注入和电能质量证据一并被要求。本草案审查期间未确认专门针对光伏逆变器的独立科威特公开EMC技术法规，因此应通过MEW、PAI/KUCAS及项目规格核实要求。
summary.zht: 對於科威特光伏逆變器項目，除非MEW或項目業主規定更詳細的本地要求，EMC和電能品質證據應圍繞IEC及GSO/GCC認可標準建立。IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準；IEC 61727規定光伏系統公用電網介面特性，可能與諧波、閃變、直流注入和電能品質證據一併被要求。本草案審查期間未確認專門針對光伏逆變器的獨立科威特公開EMC技術法規，因此應通過MEW、PAI/KUCAS及項目規格核實要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 61000 series EMC and power-quality test methods where referenced by the project specification
GSO / GCC adopted standards where applicable in Kuwait

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. This can show China-market technical conformity, but GB/T 37408 reports do not automatically demonstrate IEC 62920 or Kuwait project acceptance. Reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000-series limits where the Kuwait project asks for IEC evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408及CNAS认可实验室出具的相关国内测试报告。这可以说明中国市场技术符合性，但GB/T 37408报告不会自动证明IEC 62920或科威特项目接受性。当科威特项目要求IEC证据时，应将报告逐条映射至IEC 62920和适用的IEC 61000系列限值。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常基於GB/T 37408及CNAS認可實驗室出具的相關國內測試報告。這可以說明中國市場技術符合性，但GB/T 37408報告不會自動證明IEC 62920或科威特項目接受性。當科威特項目要求IEC證據時，應將報告逐條映射至IEC 62920和適用的IEC 61000系列限值。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T 37408 EMC reports are not a substitute for IEC 62920, IEC 61727, or project-specified IEC 61000-series evidence in Kuwait. Exporters should obtain model-specific IEC EMC and power-quality reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, confirm whether test voltage must reflect Kuwait 240/415 V at 50 Hz, and include firmware configuration and operating mode details in the technical file.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408 EMC报告不能替代科威特项目中的IEC 62920、IEC 61727或项目指定IEC 61000系列证据。出口商应从ILAC认可实验室取得型号专用IEC EMC和电能质量报告，确认测试电压是否必须反映科威特240/415 V、50 Hz条件，并在技术文件中纳入固件配置和运行模式详情。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408 EMC報告不能替代科威特項目中的IEC 62920、IEC 61727或項目指定IEC 61000系列證據。出口商應從ILAC認可實驗室取得型號專用IEC EMC和電能品質報告，確認測試電壓是否必須反映科威特240/415 V、50 Hz條件，並在技術文件中納入韌體配置和運行模式詳情。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where MEW, KUCAS/PAI, or the project owner specifies IEC EMC and power-quality evidence; exact Kuwait public PV-inverter EMC scope must be confirmed project by project
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme-dependent for China PV inverter files; not sufficient by itself for Kuwait project acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 37408 EMC evidence as background only for Kuwait. Prepare IEC 62920 and, where required, IEC 61727 and IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model and configuration. Confirm with MEW, PAI/KUCAS, and the project owner whether Kuwait 240/415 V, 50 Hz operating conditions must be reflected in the EMC and power-quality test setup.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对科威特而言，应将GB/T 37408 EMC证据仅视为背景资料。应为具体逆变器型号和配置准备IEC 62920，以及在被要求时的IEC 61727和IEC 61000系列报告。请向MEW、PAI/KUCAS和项目业主确认EMC及电能质量测试设置是否必须反映科威特240/415 V、50 Hz运行条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對科威特而言，應將GB/T 37408 EMC證據僅視為背景資料。應為具體逆變器型號和配置準備IEC 62920，以及在被要求時的IEC 61727和IEC 61000系列報告。請向MEW、PAI/KUCAS和項目業主確認EMC及電能品質測試設置是否必須反映科威特240/415 V、50 Hz運行條件。
